title: Add recursive fractal growth wireframe structures

testFiles.description: Unit tests for the cubeGrowth recursive fractal geometry generator

tests.name: generateCubeGrowth returns CubeGrowthOutput with vertexPositions as Float32Array
generateCubeGrowth returns edgePositions as Float32Array with correct length
generateCubeGrowth returns vertexRandoms and edgeRandoms as Float32Array
assertions: vertexRandoms is a Float32Array with vertexCount * 3 length
edgeRandoms is a Float32Array with edgeCount * 2 * 3 length

tests.name: CUBE_VERTICES defines exactly 8 corner positions
CUBE_EDGES defines exactly 12 edge index pairs referencing valid vertex indices
assertions: Each index pair references valid vertex indices (0-7)
No edge connects a vertex to itself

tests.name: generateCubeGrowth is deterministic — same seed and config produce identical output
different seeds produce different growth patterns
assertions: Different seeds produce different geometry (vertex counts or positions differ)

tests.name: seed cube at depth 1 produces at least 1 cube (8 vertices, 12 edges)
assertions: At minimum depth, at least one seed cube is produced (8 vertices, 12 edges)

tests.name: each cube instance contributes 8 vertices and 12 edges (verified at minimal depth)
assertions: vertexCount is a multiple of 8 (each cube contributes 8 vertices)
edgeCount is a multiple of 12 (each cube contributes 12 edges)

tests.name: recursion depth 3-5 produces increasing complexity (given sufficient budget)
assertions: Higher depth produces at least as many vertices
Higher depth produces at least as many edges

tests.name: maxVertices budget is respected — vertex count does not exceed budget
maxEdges budget is respected — edge count does not exceed budget
all vertex positions are finite
assertions: Every value in vertexPositions is finite

tests.name: all edge positions are finite
assertions: Every value in edgePositions is finite

tests.name: all vertexRandoms values are finite and in [0, 1)
all edgeRandoms values are finite and in [0, 1)
output positions fit within expected radius (~2.5, max 3.0)
assertions: All vertices are within radius 3.0 of the origin (normalized to TARGET_RADIUS ~2.5)

tests.name: output has 3D volumetric spread (non-coplanar points)
assertions: Standard deviation across all 3 axes is > 0.05 (structure is volumetric, not flat)

tests.name: noise-driven branching produces varied patterns across seeds (not identical topology)
assertions: Different seeds produce different vertex counts (branching is noise-driven)

tests.name: no stack overflow at max depth with large budget
assertions: Recursion at max depth (5) with large budget does not throw or overflow

tests.name: child cubes are scaled down relative to parent (multi-level hierarchy)
assertions: Vertex distances vary significantly, confirming multi-scale cube hierarchy

tests.name: edge positions form valid line pairs (even vertex count per edge)
assertions: edgePositions length is a multiple of 6 (2 vertices * 3 components per edge)

testFiles.description: Integration tests for the fractalGrowthWireframe Three.js system

tests.name: init() adds THREE.LineSegments and THREE.Points to the scene
assertions: At least one LineSegments object added to scene
At least one Points object added to scene

tests.name: LineSegments geometry has position attribute with itemSize 3
Points geometry has position attribute with itemSize 3
assertions: Points geometry has position attribute with itemSize 3 and count > 0

tests.name: geometry has aRandom attribute with itemSize 3 on both meshes
assertions: Both LineSegments and Points have aRandom attribute with itemSize 3

tests.name: LineSegments use ShaderMaterial with vertex and fragment shaders
assertions: vertexShader and fragmentShader are non-empty strings

tests.name: material is transparent with AdditiveBlending and depthWrite disabled
material declares required audio-reactive uniforms
assertions: All required audio-reactive uniforms are defined on the edge material

tests.name: draw() updates uTime uniform to reflect frame elapsed time
assertions: uTime uniform reflects elapsed time from FrameState

tests.name: draw() updates uBassEnergy uniform from frame params
assertions: uBassEnergy updates to match frame params bassEnergy (0 then 1.0)

tests.name: draw() updates uTrebleEnergy uniform from frame params
assertions: uTrebleEnergy updates to match frame params trebleEnergy (0 then 1.0)

tests.name: draw() updates uniforms on ALL materials (edges and vertices)
assertions: Both edge and vertex material uniforms are updated on draw

tests.name: draw() does not throw with valid FrameState
assertions: draw() with valid FrameState does not throw

tests.name: draw() does not throw with edge-case params (zero bass, zero treble, no pointer)
assertions: draw() handles zero audio energy and missing pointer data gracefully

tests.name: setOpacity updates uOpacity uniform on all materials
assertions: setOpacity(0.5) sets uOpacity to 0.5 on both materials
setOpacity(0) sets uOpacity to 0 on both materials

tests.name: cleanup() removes all objects from scene and disposes geometry/material
assertions: LineSegments and Points removed from scene

tests.name: cleanup after init with no draws does not throw
assertions: cleanup() right after init() (no draw) does not throw

tests.name: same seed produces same geometry (deterministic init)
assertions: Same seed produces identical position counts on both LineSegments and Points

tests.name: multiple draw calls do not leak objects into the scene
assertions: Scene children count remains stable after multiple draw() calls

tests.name: all uniform values remain finite after draw with extreme audio params
assertions: All numeric uniform values are finite under extreme audio parameters

tests.name: vertex shader includes noise3d declarations (snoise or fbm3 symbols)
assertions: Vertex shader contains noise3d symbols (snoise or fbm3)

tests.name: vertex shader declares fog-related varying (vFogFactor)
assertions: Vertex shader includes vFogFactor varying for depth fog

tests.name: fragment shader receives vFogFactor for depth fog
assertions: Fragment shader includes vFogFactor for depth-based fog

tests.name: config noiseOctaves is passed to uNoiseOctaves uniform
assertions: uNoiseOctaves uniform matches config noiseOctaves value

tests.name: config enablePointerRepulsion is passed to uEnablePointerRepulsion uniform
config enableSlowModulation is passed to uEnableSlowModulation uniform
LineSegments vertex count is even (valid line pairs)
assertions: LineSegments position count is even (valid pairs)

tests.name: paletteHue uniform reflects param on draw
assertions: uPaletteHue updates to reflect frame paletteHue param

tests.name: boundary values (density=0/1, structureComplexity=0/1) do not throw
assertions: draw() with density=0/structureComplexity=0 does not throw
draw() with density=1/structureComplexity=1 does not throw

tests.name: no localStorage or cookie access during fractal growth init/draw operations

testFiles.description: Integration tests for fractalgrowth quality config and compound mode registration

tests.name: extractSystemConfig returns correct config for fractalgrowth
extractSystemConfig covers fractalgrowth system name without throwing
extractSystemConfig covers all 8 supported system names (including fractalgrowth)
assertions: All 8 system names (including fractalgrowth) are supported without throwing

tests.name: fractalgrowth maxFractalDepth is clamped to 5 max even for high tier (which has maxFractalDepth=6)
assertions: High tier profile has maxFractalDepth=6 but fractalgrowth config clamps to <=5

tests.name: fractalgrowth low tier config has reduced edge budget
assertions: Low tier fractalgrowth config has maxEdgesPerShape = 30

tests.name: primaryCountForSystem returns maxEdgesPerShape for fractalgrowth
assertions: If fractalgrowth is in a compound mode, its maxPoints contribution is > 0

tests.name: COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS includes pointcloud+fractalgrowth compound mode
assertions: pointcloud is primary layer, fractalgrowth is secondary

tests.name: COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS count is 4 after adding fractalgrowth mode
tests.body: expect(COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS.length).toBe(4);
assertions: COMPOUND_MODE_DEFS now has 4 entries (was 3 before fractalgrowth)

tests.name: buildCompoundEntries returns 4 entries on medium tier (including fractalgrowth mode)
buildCompoundEntries still returns 0 entries on low tier
assertions: Low tier still produces 0 compound entries

testFiles.description: Quality tier tests for fractalgrowth-related profile fields

tests.name: low tier maxEdgesPerShape is 30 (constrains fractalgrowth to ~2-3 cubes)
medium tier maxEdgesPerShape is 480 (constrains fractalgrowth to ~40 cubes)
high tier maxEdgesPerShape is 1920 (constrains fractalgrowth to ~160 cubes)
maxFractalDepth per tier: low=3, medium=4, high=6

branches: Noise-driven face spawn probability (spawn vs skip child cube)
Budget exhaustion early exit (maxVertices and maxEdges)

assertions: buildCompoundEntries includes new mode on medium/high tier
